\begin{definition}[P-group]
\label{def:p_group}
A finite group $G$ is a $p$-group if $|G|$ is a power of $p$.
\end{definition}

\begin{theorem}[Sylow existence]
\label{thm:sylow_exists}
\lean{MyProject.GroupTheory.sylow_exists}
\uses{def:p_group}
Let $G$ be a finite group.
\end{theorem}
\begin{proof}
\uses{def:p_group}
Count orbits and conclude.
\end{proof}
